zh.lifeSummary: 當Aimone d'Aquino於1135年出生在義大利拉其福洛希農洛凱瑟卡卡斯特洛時，他的父親Rinaldo d'Aquino36歲，母親Cecilia di Medania10歲。他和Francesca di Hohenstaufen至少有1個兒子。他去世於1210年3月15日在義大利阿布盧左利阿吉拉塔格利亞可左享年75歲，埋葬在義大利拉其福洛希農艾奎諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aimone d'Aquino于1135年出生在意大利拉其福洛希農洛凱瑟卡卡斯特洛时，他的父亲Rinaldo d'Aquino36岁，母亲Cecilia di Medania10岁。他和Francesca di Hohenstaufen至少有1个儿子。他去世于1210年3月15日在意大利阿布盧左利阿吉拉塔格利亞可左享年75岁，埋葬在意大利拉其福洛希農艾奎諾。

nameMeanings.name: d'Aquino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Nicola, Stefano, Gaetano, Margherita, Nunzio, Sal, Salvatore.  Spanish Alba, Jose Alejandro, Pedro, Socorro.

Italian: habitational name for someone from a place called Aquino, of which there are several examples in Italy, but in particular the one in Lazio, birthplace of Saint Thomas Aquinas (see   Aquino  ).

variants.name: Aquino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Antonio, Pedro, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Ana, Jesus, Jorge, Josefina, Julio, Luis.  Portuguese Paulo, Catarina, Joao.  Italian Romeo, Luigi, Salvatore, Clemente, Leonardo.

Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: from a Christian personal name bestowed in honor of Saint Thomas Aquinas (1225–74; Tommaso d'Aquino in Italian, Tomás de Aquino in Spanish), an Italian Dominican friar and Doctor of the Church. This surname is also common in the Philippines. See also 2 below, compare De Aquino .
Italian: habitational name from a place called Aquino (see   D'Aquino  ), the place where the theologian (see 1 above) was born.

nameMeanings.name: Aimone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Simon  , now also quite frequently used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Aimone d'Aquino was born in 1135, in Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italy, his father, Rinaldo d'Aquino, was 36 and his mother, Cecilia di Medania, was 10. He had at least 1 son with Francesca di Hohenstaufen. He died on 15 March 1210, in Tagliacozzo, L'Aquila, Abruzzo, Italy, at the age of 75, and was buried in Aquino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aimone d'Aquino est né en 1135, à Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italie, son père, Rinaldo d'Aquino, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Cecilia di Medania, avait 10 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Francesca di Hohenstaufen. Il est décédé le 15 mars 1210, à Tagliacozzo, L'Aquila, Abruzzo, Italie, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Aquino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aimone d'Aquino 1135 in Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rinaldo d'Aquino 36 und seine Mutter Cecilia di Medania 10. Er hatte mit Francesca di Hohenstaufen mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 15. März 1210 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Tagliacozzo, L'Aquila, Abruzzo, Italien und wurde in Aquino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aimone d'Aquino è nato il nel 1135 nel Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italia, il suo padre, Rinaldo d'Aquino, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia di Medania, aveva 10 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Francesca di Hohenstaufen. Morì il 15 marzo 1210, nel Tagliacozzo, L'Aquila, Abruzzo, Italia, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Aquino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italia.

ja.Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia: イタリアカンプアニアナポリナポリ
ja.Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio,: イタリアラズオフロシノンロクケイセクカカステロ
ja.Roccasecca, Roma, Lazio, Italy: イタリアラズオロマロクケイセクカ
ja.Aquino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italia: イタリアラズオフロシノンアクイノ
ja.Tagliacozzo, L'Aquila, Abruzzo, Italia: イタリアアブルズゾル'アクイラタグリアコズゾ
ja.lifeSummary: Aimone d'Aquinoが1135年にイタリアラズオフロシノンロクケイセクカカステロで生まれた時，父Rinaldo d'Aquinoは36歳，母Cecilia di Medaniaは10歳であった。彼はFrancesca di Hohenstaufenとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1210年3月15日にイタリアアブルズゾル'アクイラタグリアコズゾで75歳で死去し，イタリアラズオフロシノンアクイノにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aimone d'Aquino(이)가 1135년 이탈리아 라지오 프로시넌 록카세c카 카스텔로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rinaldo d'Aquino(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia di Medania(은)는 10세였다. 그는 Francesca di Hohenstaufen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1210년 3월 15일 이탈리아 아브루즈오 '아키라 타그리악즈오에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 라지오 프로시넌 아키노에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aimone d'Aquino nasceu em 1135, em Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Itália, seu pai, Rinaldo d'Aquino, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia di Medania, tinha 10 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Francesca di Hohenstaufen. Ele faleceu em 15 de março de 1210, em Tagliacozzo, L'Aquila, Abruzzo, Itália, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Aquino, Frosinone, Lazio, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aimone d'Aquino родился в 1135 г. в местности кастеллоу, роккеисекка, фросиноун, лазио, Италия, его отцу по имени Rinaldo d'Aquino было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia di Medania, 10. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Francesca di Hohenstaufen. Он умер 15 марта 1210 г. в местности таглякоззо, л'акуила, абруззо, Италия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности акуино, фросиноун, лазио, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aimone d'Aquino nació en 1135, en Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italia, su papá, Rinaldo d'Aquino, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Cecilia di Medania, tenía 10 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Francesca di Hohenstaufen. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1210, en Tagliacozzo, L'Aquila, Abruzzo, Italia, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Aquino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italia.
